name: DPAPI Domain Backup Key Access or Extraction Attempt
description: Detects suspicious activity related to DPAPI domain backup keys. This includes attempts to back up the DPAPI master key and attempts to extract the LSA secret DPAPI domain backup key from Domain Controllers. Successful extraction of these keys can allow an attacker to decrypt sensitive data protected by DPAPI.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious DPAPI domain backup key access or extraction attempt detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Object Name** {object_name}, **Access Mask** {access_mask}. Investigate this critical event immediately as it may indicate an attempt to decrypt sensitive data or escalate privileges.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for DPAPI master key backup (4692) or object access (4662).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The process attempting the backup or extraction.

parameters.name: object_name
parameters.description: The name of the object being accessed (e.g., *BCKUPKEY*).
